metadata.title: DeutschPilot – Premium German Courses & Retreats
metadata.description: DeutschPilot is the premium learning platform for fast progress, real results, and new opportunities.

hero.title:
Learn German.
Your way.
Your future.
hero.subtitle: DeutschPilot is more than a course — it's your personal compass for fast progress and real goals.

courses.title: Our German courses
courses.subtitle: Find the course that fits you.

intensive.title: Super-intensive courses
intensive.desc: Learn faster with maximum structure — online or on site.

ai.title: AI learning companion
ai.desc: Your AI tutor supports you around the clock.

certificate.title: Certificate
certificate.desc: Earn a recognised certificate for your level.

retreats.title: Retreats
retreats.desc: Immersive learning in an inspiring environment.

maria.name: Maria L.
maria.text: The live sessions and the community helped me enormously. I now feel confident in everyday life and at work.

jonas.name: Jonas S.
jonas.text: Thanks to DeutschPilot, I reached B1 much faster than expected. The structure and the teachers are simply top-notch.

aylin.name: Aylin K.
aylin.text: The super-intensive retreat was the best decision. Learning in that environment is unbeatable.

retreats.title: Learn deeply. Switch off. Recharge.
retreats.subtitle: Our language retreats combine intensive learning with relaxation, nature, and inspiring people.

placementTest.title: Placement test
placementTest.subtitle: Free · 10 questions · ~5 minutes
placementTest.intro: Answer 10 multiple-choice questions to find your current German level. Your result will be saved to your profile.
placementTest.question: Question
placementTest.loginToSave: Sign in to save your result
